metadata.title: Time Will Reveal (Long Version)
metadata.album: Time Will Reveal: The Complete Motown Albums
metadata.lyrics:
[00:09.32] What can I do to make you feel secure, remove all your doubts
[00:19.40] So that you'll know for sure that you're the apple of my eye girl
[00:26.63] Fulfillment of my dreams, time, will show the value
[00:35.15] Of just what you mean to me
[00:38.70] More precious than silver, more precious than diamond rings
[00:44.12] Or anything that I can give you, it wouldn't mean a thing
[00:52.52] If you didn't have my love beside you there to guide you through
[00:59.55] But it is good to know you do
[01:03.02] I know just how you feel
[01:07.37] But this time love's for real
[01:11.01] In time it will reveal
[01:13.59] That special love that's deep inside of us will all reveal in time
[01:28.65] I tell you I love you but you won't believe it's true
[01:35.98] More precious than silver, more precious than diamond rings
[01:41.39] Or anything that I can give you, it wouldn't mean a thing
[01:49.85] If you didn't have my love beside you there to guide you through
[01:56.74] But it is good to know you do, aah
[02:00.94] I know just how you feel
[02:04.54] But this time love's for real
[02:07.64] In time it will reveal
[02:10.88] That special love that's deep inside of us will all reveal in time
[02:19.64] I know just how you feel
[02:23.01] But this time love's for real
[02:26.47] In time it will reveal
[02:29.22] That special love that's deep inside of us will all reveal in time
[02:40.02] Say it baby, yeah babe
[02:42.64] Or anything that I can give you, it wouldn't mean a thing
[03:05.56] If you didn't have my love beside you there to guide you through
[03:12.47] But it is good to know you do
[03:14.99] I know just how you feel
[03:20.28] But this time love's for real
[03:23.32] In time it will reveal
[03:26.52] That special love that's deep inside of us will all reveal in time
[03:35.38] I know just how you feel
[03:38.78] But this time love's for real
[03:42.20] In time it will reveal
[03:45.10] Hey oh, that special lovin' arms will all reveal in time
[03:53.66] I know just how you feel
[03:55.73] So let you're little heart lay down my body
[04:00.96] In time it will reveal
[04:07.22] That special love that's deep inside of us will all reveal in time
[04:29.84]
